dialogue_text: This will serve me a lesson,
source_excerpt: "This will serve me a lesson," said he, "to look where I step. For if I should kill another bug or beetle I should surely cry again, and crying rusts my jaws so that I cannot speak."

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.
